ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_lines" (
  "clothing_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing line */,
  "clothing_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the clothing line belongs to */,
  "target_age_group" TEXT /* Age group the clothing line is designed for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the clothing line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the clothing line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "clothing_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing line the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_line_id") REFERENCES clothing_lines ("clothing_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 5, 6, 7) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Chest, Waist, Hip) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the measurement */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer service) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the size chart */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the feedback is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (1-5) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being sold */,
  "clothing_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing line being sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was made */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sale was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the sales event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the sales event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_clothing_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_line_id") REFERENCES clothing_lines ("clothing_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version changes */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the change is part of */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the change is for */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement being changed */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the measurement */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the measurement */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the change was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_changes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES size_chart_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_size_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the mapping is for */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the customer prefers */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "preferred" INTEGER /* Whether the size is the customer's preferred size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_size_mapping_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
